message:
chore(beads): close completed epics IDEA-28 + IDEA-12

Closed epics with all children complete:
- bd-2kf9 (IDEA-28) Cost/Usage Telemetry + Budget Guardrails
  - bd-32sh: Implement usage metric schema + host aggregation ✓
  - bd-24dv: Unit tests for budget enforcement ✓
  - bd-36w3: E2E budget scenario with simulated costs ✓
- bd-3bus (IDEA-12) Structured Log Test Harness (fcp-testkit)
  - bd-1v95: LogCapture helper implementation ✓
  - bd-1z9x: Log harness example integration ✓
  - bd-1pdk: Log harness tests ✓

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2i9g","title":"[IDEA-18.3] E2E simulation scenarios in harness","description":"## Scenario
- Run simulate in a deterministic 3-node harness.
- Compare simulate decision to actual invocation (allow/deny) without executing side effects.

## Logging
- JSONL log entries with `phase=simulate` and evidence object IDs.
## Logging
- Emit structured JSONL per `docs/STANDARD_Testing_Logging.md` with `test_name`, `module`, `phase`, `correlation_id`, and `result`.
- Persist JSONL artifacts and validate with `fcp_conformance::schemas::validate_e2e_log_jsonl`.

 {"id":"bd-2ij2","title":"[IDEA-11.1] Streaming health state model","description":"## Goal
Define health transitions and mapping to HealthSnapshot.

## Details
- Add transition table (Healthy → Degraded on missed heartbeat; → Unhealthy on zombie).
- Include optional fields: last_heartbeat_at, last_ack_at, reconnect_count.

## Tests
- Unit tests for transition logic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- HealthSnapshot accurately reflects streaming connection state.","notes":"Implemented StreamingHealthState + streaming health snapshot mapping + unit test; parent bd-j7w1 still open.","status":"blocked","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:38:23.613826006Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T04:13:45.204590665Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2ij2","depends_on_id":"bd-j7w1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:38:23.627434050Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

-{"id":"bd-2kf9","title":"[IDEA-28] Cost/Usage Telemetry + Budget Guardrails","description":"## Background
Docs call out usage metrics and cost estimates, but there is no unified telemetry pipeline or budget enforcement.

## Goals
- Define a standard UsageMetric/CostEstimate object schema.
- Aggregate metrics in host for per-zone budgets.
- Deny or warn when budgets are exceeded (policy-driven).

## Non-goals
- Hard-coded pricing tables; budgets are policy-owned.

## Approach
- Add schema + SDK helpers to emit usage metrics.
- Host aggregates metrics and enforces budget policy.
- CLI exposes budget status for operators.

## Risks
- Inaccurate estimates; keep estimates optional and label confidence.

## Success Criteria
- Over-budget operations are denied with clear reason codes (when configured).
- Metrics are queryable via CLI/API.

## Acceptance Criteria (Refined)
- Budget enforcement can be configured as warn or deny.
- CLI reports current usage vs budget per zone.
","notes":"Added UsageBudgetPolicy/BudgetEnforcement + UsageBudgetSnapshot types in fcp-core policy. Added OperationReceipt.usage_metrics with signable bytes inclusion + UsageMetricKind::as_str. Added FcpError::BudgetExceeded (FCP-6004) + explain mapping. Host: BudgetTracker/BudgetPolicyEngine + PreflightResponse.budget_status. CLI: new fcp budget command with JSON/human output (simulated). Updated vecgen + tests. Ran cargo fmt/check, cargo check, clippy, and cargo test.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:48:54.948579440Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T18:51:23.349349507Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-2kf9","title":"[IDEA-28] Cost/Usage Telemetry + Budget Guardrails","description":"## Background
Docs call out usage metrics and cost estimates, but there is no unified telemetry pipeline or budget enforcement.

## Goals
- Define a standard UsageMetric/CostEstimate object schema.
- Aggregate metrics in host for per-zone budgets.
- Deny or warn when budgets are exceeded (policy-driven).

## Non-goals
- Hard-coded pricing tables; budgets are policy-owned.

## Approach
- Add schema + SDK helpers to emit usage metrics.
- Host aggregates metrics and enforces budget policy.
- CLI exposes budget status for operators.

## Risks
- Inaccurate estimates; keep estimates optional and label confidence.

## Success Criteria
- Over-budget operations are denied with clear reason codes (when configured).
- Metrics are queryable via CLI/API.

## Acceptance Criteria (Refined)
- Budget enforcement can be configured as warn or deny.
- CLI reports current usage vs budget per zone.
","notes":"Added UsageBudgetPolicy/BudgetEnforcement + UsageBudgetSnapshot types in fcp-core policy. Added OperationReceipt.usage_metrics with signable bytes inclusion + UsageMetricKind::as_str. Added FcpError::BudgetExceeded (FCP-6004) + explain mapping. Host: BudgetTracker/BudgetPolicyEngine + PreflightResponse.budget_status. CLI: new fcp budget command with JSON/human output (simulated). Updated vecgen + tests. Ran cargo fmt/check, cargo check, clippy, and cargo test.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:48:54.948579440Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T20:25:50.013251503Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T20:25:50.013181032Z","close_reason":"All children complete: bd-32sh, bd-24dv, bd-36w3","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-2kn5","title":"[IDEA-15.1] SelfCheck trait + SDK registration","description":"## Goal
Define `SelfCheck` trait and registration in SDK.

## Details
- Trait method returns structured status + reason codes.
- Enforce timeouts and no-side-effects contract.

## Tests
- Unit tests for default implementation and error mapping.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Connectors can implement self-checks with minimal boilerplate.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:45:07.942565573Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T01:30:07.264733936Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T01:30:07.264574580Z","close_reason":"Implemented SelfCheckReport + default FcpConnector::self_check, SDK exports, and unit tests","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2kn5","depends_on_id":"bd-1nq6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:45:07.956074720Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

Add tests for the capability ID lint rule.

## Details
- Use manifest fixtures with invalid capability IDs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Tests cover hostname/port and URL-like patterns.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:40:25.183487189Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T20:07:45.904182994Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T20:07:45.904059445Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2kt1","depends_on_id":"bd-1d8q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:40:25.198778661Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

Provide example usage and integration tests for ThreadInfo.

@@ -108,7 +108,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-39gj","title":"E2E-SCRIPTS: Scenario matrix + runner + detailed logging","description":"# E2E-SCRIPTS: Scenario matrix + runner + detailed logging

## Goal
Provide a comprehensive set of E2E scripts plus a runner that executes them with consistent, detailed JSONL logging.

## Scope
- Scenario matrix: happy path, denial path, revocation, taint approval, offline repair, batch invoke, quota/rate limits, sandbox egress denial.
- Script runner that collects logs and validates JSONL schema.
- Summary report with pass/fail and timing per scenario.

## Constraints
- Scripts must use real fcp CLI and harness commands.
- Logs must include correlation IDs and artifacts per step.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Runner can execute all scenarios locally with a single command.
- All scripts emit schema-compliant logs.
- Summary report includes pass/fail, duration, and key artifacts.

 {"id":"bd-39j0","title":"[IDEA-29.1] Implement egress policy explain CLI","description":"## What
Implement `fcp net explain --url` and reusable evaluator API.

## How
- Parse URL; apply NetworkConstraints evaluation in dry-run mode.
- Output allow/deny + reason code + suggested allowlist changes.

## Success Criteria
- No network calls; purely local evaluation.

## Acceptance Criteria (Refined)
- Evaluator performs no network I/O.
- Suggests minimal allowlist change when blocked.

-{"id":"bd-3bus","title":"[IDEA-12] Structured Log Test Harness (fcp-testkit)","description":"# Structured Log Test Harness (fcp-testkit)

## Goal
Provide a reusable test harness that validates structured logs against the JSONL schema, enabling deterministic logging tests across crates.

## Background / Why
Testing/logging requirements demand JSONL logs, but tests currently validate logs ad hoc. A shared harness reduces duplication and enforces consistency.

## Scope
- Add log capture + schema validation helper in `fcp-testkit` or `fcp-conformance`.
- Provide examples for integration tests and E2E scripts.

## Deliverables
- `LogCapture` helper + `assert_logs_valid(schema)`.
- Example usage in one integration test.

## Tests
- Unit tests for the harness itself.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Logging validation can be enabled with a single helper call.","notes":"Extended fcp-testkit LogCapture to support test harness use: added push_line (manual JSONL line) and push_value (serde_json::Value -> JSONL) helpers; added unit tests validating schema success/failure and line numbering. fmt/check/clippy clean after changes.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"OliveDesert","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:39:12.376361299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T21:29:34.875837066Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bus","depends_on_id":"bd-11g2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:39:49.617428147Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-3c0g","title":"[IDEA-25.1] Implement auto-tuning + presets","description":"## What
Implement parameter auto-tuning logic and preset table.

## How
- Evaluate MTU and path type.
- Select symbol size + repair factors from preset table.
- Expose config overrides.

## Success Criteria
- Default presets are applied deterministically based on path.

## Acceptance Criteria (Refined)
- Selected parameters never exceed MTU safety limits.
- Overrides are validated and bounded.
","notes":"Added RaptorQPathProfile + RaptorQPreset, MTU-safe symbol sizing, preset->config, clamp helper, and tests for MTU/preset bounds in config.rs; re-exported in lib.rs. cargo fmt --check fails due to unrelated fcp-conformance formatting diffs; cargo check ok with existing warning; cargo clippy fails due to unrelated fcp-conformance lint errors.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RedTower","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:46:58.284349412Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T15:39:20.973466582Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T15:39:20.973392484Z","close_reason":"Completed: added presets + MTU-safe sizing + bounds with tests; fmt/check/clippy clean.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3c0g","depends_on_id":"bd-f4sw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:46:58.291338948Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3ci5","title":"[IDEA-04.4] CursorStore tests + E2E scenario","description":"## Goal
Comprehensive tests for CursorStore behavior and resilience.

## Details
- Unit tests for schema encoding/decoding and monotonic constraints.
- E2E scenario with simulated node failover and lease transfer.

## Tests
- Deterministic JSONL logs (depends on bd-11g2).
- Failure injection (duplicate offsets, stale cursor writes).

## Acceptance Criteria
- CursorStore is safe against regressions and fork scenarios.
- E2E harness demonstrates safe resume.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:31:59.901308115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T21:48:08.480459622Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T21:48:08.480390884Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ci5","depends_on_id":"bd-11g2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:32:34.305999347Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3ci5","depends_on_id":"bd-2cqj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:31:59.916069942Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3dl4","title":"[IDEA-21.2] Unit tests for zone policy diff","description":"## Coverage
- Capability add/remove diff.
- Transport policy changes (DERP/Funnel toggles).
- Ceiling changes (max risk tier).

## Logging
- Structured logs include policy ObjectIds.
## Logging
- Emit structured JSONL per `docs/STANDARD_Testing_Logging.md` with `test_name`, `module`, `phase`, `correlation_id`, and `result`.
- Validate with `fcp_conformance::schemas::validate_e2e_log_jsonl` (use `fcp-testkit` LogCapture in unit tests).
